problem: Why does quantum superposition collapse — can decoherence be prevented at scale?
hypothesis: If Acoustic levitation for contactless manipulation is applied to prevented, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Computational simulation with 8 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
